title: Dark Health Data: AI-extracted open datasets from buried public-health documents
description: An open-source pipeline that turns buried public-health and healthcare documents (PDFs) into open, research-ready datasets via AI extraction, with a verification layer (grounding, symbolic + LNN-inspired neurosymbolic constraints, heterogeneous ensemble, and a conformal selective-acceptance gate). Connectors: Medicaid External Quality Review (EQR) technical reports, hospital Community Health Needs Assessments (CHNA), and Maternal Mortality Review Committee (MMRC) reports.
